message:
Fix skill directory naming to match skill name

The skill output directory must match the skill name in SKILL.md
frontmatter. Changed SKILL_NAME from "tenzir-skill" to "tenzir" in
the generation script and updated workflow commands accordingly. This
resolves the Release job failure where skills-ref validation
complained: "Directory name 'tenzir-skill' must match skill name
'tenzir'".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -243,15 +243,15 @@ jobs:
       - name: Build skill
         run: |
           bun run build:skill
-          tar -czf tenzir-skill.tar.gz -C tenzir-skill .
+          tar -czf tenzir-skill.tar.gz -C tenzir .
 
       - name: Install uv
         uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
 
       - name: Validate skill
         run: |
           uv tool install git+https://github.com/agentskills/agentskills.git#subdirectory=skills-ref
-          skills-ref validate tenzir-skill
+          skills-ref validate tenzir
 
       - name: Delete existing release assets
         run: |
